title: RVT.BSP.004.ENVELOPE_INITIALIZED — A budget envelope has been opened for the current period
description: Domain-event-DDD payload published by AGG.BSP.004.ENV.PERIOD_BUDGET each time an envelope is created — at initial allocation (CMD.ALLOCATE_PERIOD_BUDGET, one event per category) or when a tier upgrade adds a previously absent category (CMD.RECALIBRATE_PERIOD_BUDGET). One bus message per envelope.

event_id.description: Unique identifier of this resource event. Used by consumers for idempotency.

occurred_at.description: When the envelope was opened in the producer.

period_index.description: Zero-based period index in the case's participation.

allocation_id.description: Unique identifier of this envelope (one per category in a period).

cap_amount.description: Maximum authorised amount for this envelope over the period.

tier_id.description: Identifier of the tier that produced this allocation (snapshot).

causation_event_id.description: Identifier of the upstream resource event that triggered the allocation (RVT.BSP.002.CASE_OPENED or RVT.BSP.001.TIER_UPGRADE_RECORDED).
